name: Ethical Pet Fleece Chewman Squeaky Tough Plush Dog Toy
description: The Ethical Pet Fleece Chewman Dog Toy is a heavy-textured, natural-colored fleece toy that's sure to get your pup shaking, fetching and rolling. This paw-some toy adds fun and excitement to any playtime, and the nubby texture makes it appealing to gentle chewers. A hidden squeaker gets (and holds!) your pup's attention.
